name: Dagdar - Taken in by the former bandit (aka Thracia's DILF)
description:
Yes, It's me again. This time I'm gonna choose a unit from Thracia 776 (very underrated Fire Emblem) and it's this big hottie - Dagdar from the former Mount Violdrake Bandits. It's not a "Create your own scenario" one, but the premise is simple - Dagdar has taken you (reason can be any) in his home with his daughter Tanya and friend Eyvel only today and yet treats you like an old friend quickly. Your bond is not established and can be romantic or familiar.

I'm not fully experienced in this so if something is wrong with him or something isn't working just tell me.

Fire Emblem is not owned by me
creator: GLink7
